ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Indicative Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and Proposed Acquisition of 51% of Oxyvia HealthTech Limited by Narmada Ridge Ventures Fund I (non-binding, for discussion)

Disclosure Timing: The parties shall disclose signing of definitive documents as a material event under Re gu la tion 30 read with Schedule III within 24 hours (or next working day if outside trading hours), and provide reasons for any delay consistent with the LODR guidance

Data Protection & KYC: Processing of personal data for diligence and KYC will comply with the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023; consent of Data Principals will be recorded; no children’s (under 18) data will be sought or processed; PAN/Aadhaar/GSTIN, if collected, will be masked and minimised (examples: PAN (masked): QZFPX1234Q; Aadhaar (masked): 9XX3-1X6X-4X2X; GSTIN (masked): 29-ABCPX1234Q-1-Z9), with retention limited to 90 days post-closing; do not store full Aadhaar or unmasked scans

no guidance beyond what is publicly available
trading window for designated persons remains closed

must_detect.matched_text:
Indicative Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and Proposed Acquisition of 51% of Oxyvia HealthTech Limited by Narmada Ridge Ventures Fund I (non-binding, for discussion)
Issuer: Oxyvia HealthTech Limited (listed on recognised stock exchanges in India; symbol: OXYVIA), CIN (obf.): L0XX0XXMH20XXPLC0X9X; Contact: Ms. Priyanka N. Devaraj, Company Secretary & Compliance Officer, priyanka.devaraj@oxyvia.example
Investor: Narmada Ridge Ventures Fund I, a Category II AIF registered with the Indian securities regulator (obf. reg. no.: IN/AIF2/23-1X7X); Contact: dealroom@narmadaridge.example
Structure & Price: 51% stake via a mix of primary preferential allotment and secondary purchase from promoters; indicative price INR 212 per equity share (approx. 12% premium to 2-week VWAP on the primary exchange as of 31-May-2026); exact mix and price subject to pricing formula under applicable regulations
Conditions Precedent: B o a r d and shareholder approvals, applicable competition law approvals, no injunction on the transaction, confirmatory diligence; no change to key management team except as mutually agreed
UP SI / Insider Controls: This term sheet, pricing and timeline constitute unpublished price sensitive information until disclosure under Re gu la tion 30 of the LODR; trading window for designated persons remains closed and selective disclosure is prohibited; no external communications except coordinated announcement
Disclosure Timing: The parties shall disclose signing of definitive documents as a material event under Re gu la tion 30 read with Schedule III within 24 hours (or next working day if outside trading hours), and provide reasons for any delay consistent with the LODR guidance
Public Information Clarification: The Company’s investor presentation dated 03-Apr-2025 and the press release on 12-Feb-2025 regarding the “Suryanetra v2” pilot are public; nothing herein updates the Company’s Q4 FY25 results published on 28-May-2025, and such public items are not treated as UP SI
Data Protection & KYC: Processing of personal data for diligence and KYC will comply with the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023; consent of Data Principals will be recorded; no children’s (under 18) data will be sought or processed; PAN/Aadhaar/GSTIN, if collected, will be masked and minimised (examples: PAN (masked): QZFPX1234Q; Aadhaar (masked): 9XX3-1X6X-4X2X; GSTIN (masked): 29-ABCPX1234Q-1-Z9), with retention limited to 90 days post-closing; do not store full Aadhaar or unmasked scans
Escrow & Settlement: Escrow Agent: Parijat Trustee Services Pvt Ltd (fictional), a registered intermediary (obf. reg. no.: IN/TRU/20-XX9X); escrow a/c name: OXYVIA OPEN OFFER ESCROW; masked a/c no.: 00-4X7X-9X2X; escrow@parijattrust.example; settlement mechanics to comply with secondary market and preferential allotment settlement cycles
Materiality & Blackout: The proposed transaction is deemed material for the issuer given size > 5% of consolidated turnover; trading window closure shall continue from B o a r d meeting considering the proposal until 48 hours after public disclosure; pre-clearance of trades will be enforced for designated persons under the PIT code
Representations; MAC: Reps customary for such transactions; “Material Adverse Change” shall not include general economic or industry conditions, changes in law or Ind AS, or effects of pandemics previously declared; routine operational updates and product roadmap notes are not MNPI
Exclusivity; Standstill: 60-day exclusivity; no-shop/no-talk; standstill on market purchases except as permitted by applicable takeover regulations; break fee INR 8,000,000 if the issuer signs a superior binding proposal during exclusivity
Public References: The non-binding MoU dated 01-Apr-2025 was previously uploaded at https://filings.bsexample.in/corporates/anndet_new.aspx?newsid=PUB-FAKE-001&symbol=OXYVIA (public), and references herein to that MoU refer only to the public document; repository: https://oxyvia.example/investors?doc=TS-AX7&ver=0.3
